notes_for_next_session: (0) *** INDICATOR ENGINE CHANGED 2026-06-03 (commit 7e86736) — READ BEFORE EVALUATING ENTRIES *** Two fixes landed in scripts/compute_indicators.py + lib/indicators.py: (a) BAR FETCH is now end-anchored — it returns the MOST-RECENT bars. Previously Alpaca's `limit` param returned the OLDEST bars in the window, so RSI/EMA/MACD/EMA-200 and even `close`/watchlist price were computed off days-stale bars (e.g. NVDA was running last Friday's data). Indicators are now current. (b) rel_vol is REDEFINED as time-of-day RVOL (lib.indicators.time_of_day_rvol): today's cumulative volume vs the AVERAGE cumulative volume up to the SAME time of day over the prior ~14 sessions. It is feed-agnostic, so it no longer reads structurally low on the free IEX feed. New REL_VOL values center around ~1.0 (verified live: NVDA 1.08, AAPL 1.52, MBUU 1.72, MCY 0.12). IMPORTANT: the old rel_vol numbers in notes (1)-(5) below are from the BROKEN definition — do NOT compare against them. With the gate now meaningful, the REL_VOL_MIN 1.5 threshold (config.py) should let real volume surges through; if entries still look too sparse/loose after a few live runs, that threshold is now the right knob to revisit (defaults unchanged for now). VWAP also now resets per session. Config adds INDICATOR_INTRADAY_LOOKBACK_DAYS=20, RVOL_LOOKBACK_DAYS=14. All 36 tests pass. (1) 2026-06-03 12:35 ET midday run: 0 open positions (nothing to manage; Parts 3-4 skipped), ZERO new entries. Account healthy ~$99,997, day P&L -$5.24 (-0.01%), no kill_switch/no_trade flags, VIX 16.39, SPY trending up. Conservative correct outcome. (2) Re-ran the full 7-criteria entry gate on all 25 watchlist names at midday — NONE passed, identical to the 10:00 run. Binding constraint still rel_vol < 1.5 on 24/25 (cumulative IEX 5-min volume / 20d avg daily vol reads structurally low on the free IEX feed — it did NOT meaningfully rise by midday as hoped). Only MCY (rel_vol 2.37) and MBUU (4.76) clear volume but both are in downtrends (EMA9<EMA21, RSI 28/50, MACD falling) — pullbacks, correctly skipped. The big momentum names (NVDA, AAPL, AMZN, AVGO, MSFT, META) are all flat/coiled: EMA9~EMA21, MACD not rising, rel_vol 0.1-0.2. (3) For the 3:45 PM EOD agent: NO positions to evaluate for overnight hold — nothing open. Entry window is closed (>1:00 PM). Just refresh account/P&L, confirm flat, and log EOD. No overnight gap-risk decisions needed. (4) OPS NOTE persisting from open: the 8:30 ET premarket auto-scan has failed to fire multiple sessions; open-market agent re-ran it manually. Real fix to the premarket_scan.py trigger still needed. (5) STRUCTURAL: rel_vol < 1.5 is the de-facto blocker on essentially every run with the free IEX feed; if this persists with 0 trades over more sessions, consider whether the rel_vol computation/threshold needs revisiting (data-feed limitation vs. genuine signal). Defaults remain correct for now (0 indicator_stats samples, no active_parameter_adjustments).
